subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ru'ya (Tablet of the Vision)
subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Give thou ear unto My Voice ringing from around the precincts of My Throne
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی استمع ندائی من حول عرشی لیبلغک الی بحر ما له ساحل و ما بلغ قعره
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @symbolism, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
